Title: Junior Data Analyst - Digital Assurance Team
Description:
The chance to build a better future is right in front of you

Do Work That Matters - Il tuo ruolo e le tue responsabilità

Vuoi fare un lavoro che sia davvero significativo e di impatto? In KPMG avrai l’opportunità di aiutare i clienti, la società, le colleghe e i colleghi ad affrontare e risolvere le sfide più attuali e complesse

Il Digital Assurance Team è un team all’avanguardia di KPMG in cui diverse competenze collaborano per dare forma alla digitalizzazione del futuro dei servizi di assurance e revisione contabile. A vrai l’opportunità di lavorare a fianco di revisori esperti sviluppando, attraverso la formazione interna ma soprattutto il training on the job, la capacità di analizzare criticamente i processi aziendali a supporto dell’informativa finanziaria e i dati elaborati dai sistemi informativi delle società identificando elementi di anomalia ed interpretando le dinamiche alla base dei trend economico-finanziari.

Starting date: Ottobre 2026

Tipologia di inserimento: Apprendistato

Ufficio: Milano

Nello specifico ti occuperai di:


Sviluppo di soluzioni di analytics a supporto dei team di audit (transactional analytics, dashboard di analisi di dati contabili, process mining, KPI di processo, ecc)
Sviluppo di tecniche di revisione basate sull’utilizzo di soluzioni tecnologiche innovative
Supporto ai team nell’utilizzo delle soluzioni proposte
Cura di eventi di comunicazione volti a far conoscere il progetto / le soluzioni


Come As You Are - Le tue competenze e caratteristiche

Questa opportunità è perfetta per te se:


Hai una formazione di base economico-contabile
Hai spiccato interesse per l’area del reporting finanziario e per i data analytics
Hai voglia di imparare e metterti in gioco
Vuoi crescere all’interno di un Network Internazionale


Your Future With Us - Cosa troverai in KPMG


Un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, equo e che rispetta, incoraggia e valorizza le diversità
Un contesto stimolante e dinamico che incentiva la creatività e il lavoro di squadra
Modalità di lavoro ibrida, per promuovere un sano equilibrio tra vita lavorativa e personale
Programmi di formazione e sviluppo avanzati per rimanere sempre aggiornati
Mindset internazionale e progettualità innovative
Iniziative incentrate sul benessere psicofisico


Together for Better – I nostri valori e il nostro impegno

Leadership, lavoro in team, rispetto di ogni individualità, approfondimento continuo, trasparenza, impegno verso la comunità, integrità: questi sono i Valori di KPMG che danno vita a un ambiente aperto allo scambio di idee e di conoscenza, che permette ai nostri professionisti di esprimere tutto il loro potenziale.

Grazie all’impegno nel favorire un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, il nostro Network risulta conforme agli standard dei requisiti ISO 30415, sul Sistema di Gestione per la Diversità e l’Inclusione, e UNI PdR 125, relativa alla parità di genere.

Unisciti a noi!

I tuoi dati saranno trattati nel pieno rispetto delle disposizioni del Regolamento (UE) n. 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation - "GDPR") e successive modifiche. Per ulteriori informazioni, consultare l'informativa sulla privacy di KPMG .

KPMG S.p.A. garantisce le pari opportunità.

The chance to build a better future is right in front of you

Responsibilities

Do Work That Matters - Your Role and Responsibilities

Do you want to do work that is truly meaningful and impactful? At KPMG, you will have the opportunity to help clients, society, and your colleagues tackle and solve the most current and complex challenges.

The Digital Assurance Team is KPMG’s innovative team which brings together different skill sets to shape the digitalization of the future for assurance and audit services. You will have the opportunity to work alongside expert auditors – through in-house courses and especially on-the-job training – developing the ability to critically analyse the company processes used in financial reporting and the information processed by the companies’ IT systems, identifying errors and interpreting the dynamics underlying financial performance.

Starting date: October 2026

Type of contract : Apprenticeship

Office: Milan

Specifically, you will be tasked with:


The development of analytics solutions for audit teams (transactional analytics, dashboards for the analysis of accounting data, process mining, process KPIs, etc.)
The development of audit techniques based on the use of innovative technological solutions
Assistance to the audit teams in using the new solutions
The organization of communication initiatives to raise awareness of the project/solutions.


Skills

Come As You Are - Your Skills and Characteristics

This is the perfect opportunity for you if:


You have a business/accounting background with a degree in business subject
You have a strong interest in financial reporting and data analytics
You have a desire to learn and challenge yourself
You want to grow within an International Network


Your Future With Us - What You Will Find at KPMG


An inclusive and equitable work environment that respects, encourages, and values diversity.
A challenging and dynamic environment that encourages creativity and teamwork.
Hybrid work arrangements to promote a healthy work-life balance.
Advanced training and development programs to stay current.
International mindset and innovative projects.
Initiatives focused on physical and mental well-being.


Together for Better – Our Values and Commitment

Leadership, teamwork, respect for individuality, continuous learning, transparency, community engagement, integrity: these are the values of KPMG that create an environment open to the exchange of ideas and knowledge, allowing our professionals to express their full potential.

As a result of our commitment to fostering an inclusive work environment, our Network complies with the standards of the ISO 30415 requirements, on the Diversity and Inclusion Management System, and UNI PdR 125, relating to gender equality.

Join us!

Your data will be processed in full compliance with the provisions of Regulation (EU) no. 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation - “GDPR”), as amended. For more information, please see KPMG’s privacy policy .

KPMG S.p.A. is an equal opportunity employer.

Office: Milan

Specifically, you will be tasked with:

  • The development of analytics solutions for audit teams (transactional analytics, dashboards for the analysis of accounting data, process mining, process KPIs, etc.)
  • The development of audit techniques based on the use of innovative technological solutions
  • Assistance to the audit teams in using the new solutions
  • The organization of communication initiatives to raise awareness of the project/solutions.

Skills

 Come As You Are - Your Skills and Characteristics

This is the perfect opportunity for you if:

  • You have a business/accounting background with a degree in business subject
  • You have a strong interest in financial reporting and data analytics
  • You have a desire to learn and challenge yourself
  • You want to grow within an International Network

Your Future With Us - What You Will Find at KPMG

  • An inclusive and equitable work environment that respects, encourages, and values diversity.
  • A challenging and dynamic environment that encourages creativity and teamwork.
  • Hybrid work arrangements to promote a healthy work-life balance.
  • Advanced training and development programs to stay current.
  • International mindset and innovative projects.
  • Initiatives focused on physical and mental well-being.

Together for Better – Our Values and Commitment

Leadership, teamwork, respect for individuality, continuous learning, transparency, community engagement, integrity: these are the values of KPMG that create an environment open to the exchange of ideas and knowledge, allowing our professionals to express their full potential.

As a result of our commitment to fostering an inclusive work environment, our Network complies with the standards of the ISO 30415 requirements, on the Diversity and Inclusion Management System, and UNI PdR 125, relating to gender equality.

Join us!

Your data will be processed in full compliance with the provisions of Regulation (EU) no. 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation - “GDPR”), as amended. For more information, please see KPMG’s privacy policy .

KPMG S.p.A. is an equal opportunity employer.

Title: Data Analytics & Visualization Associate - Milano
Description:
Vuoi essere al centro di prospettive di crescita uniche?
Entra nella practice Technology Consulting di PwC e diventa:Data Analytics & Visualization Associate

YOUR PERSPECTIVE

Farai parte di un team che sviluppa soluzioni avanzate di Business Intelligence e Data Analytics per progetti di Digital Transformation in settori come Automotive, Industrial Manufacturing, Consumer Markets, Energy & Utilities, Financial Services, Telco & Media. Lavorerai con le tecnologie più recenti per trasformare i dati in insight concreti.

Le tue attività principali saranno:

Sviluppo end-to-end di soluzioni BI: dalla raccolta dei requisiti alla realizzazione di dashboard interattive.

Implementazione di processi ETL per l’integrazione e la trasformazione dei dati provenienti da diverse fonti.

Data Modeling: progettazione di modelli relazionali e semantici per ottimizzare performance e scalabilità.

Data Preparation: pulizia, normalizzazione e arricchimento dei dati per garantire qualità e coerenza.

Sviluppo di report e dashboard utilizzando strumenti di Data Visualization (Power BI, Qlik, Tableau).

Analisi comparativa delle tecnologie e studi di fattibilità per scegliere le soluzioni più adatte.

Ottimizzazione delle query e tuning delle performance su database relazionali e modelli analitici.

YOUR UNIQUE STRENGHTS

Laurea in Informatica, Ingegneria, Economia, Matematica o discipline affini.

Esperienza nello sviluppo con almeno uno dei principali tool di Data Visualization: Power BI, QlikView/QlikSense, Tableau.

Conoscenza di SQL e dei linguaggi di manipolazione dati (T-SQL, DAX, M, Phyton, PySpark).

Familiarità con ETL e tecniche di Data Modeling.

Comprensione dei concetti di Data Preparation e gestione di dataset complessi.

Interesse per Business Intelligence, Data Analytics e Big Data.

Plus: certificazioni su Power BI, Qlik, Tableau.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
All’interno del team Quality, il ruolo di Quality Reporting & Controlling Analyst contribuisce al monitoraggio e all’analisi dei principali KPI di qualità e performance operative, supportando la produzione di reportistica e insight a supporto del miglioramento continuo dei processi aziendali.




Cosa farai

Ti occuperai di raccogliere, analizzare e valorizzare dati e indicatori a supporto delle decisioni strategiche e operative, in particolare:

Raccolta, integrazione e analisi di dati da fonti eterogenee (database relazionali, sistemi BI, strumenti operativi)
Produzione, certificazione e monitoraggio dei report e degli indicatori ufficiali del gruppo
Collaborazione con il team IT per ottimizzare pipeline e modelli dati
Supporto alle funzioni business nella comprensione dei dati e nell’interpretazione degli insight
Interfaccia con dipartimenti interni, Holding e sedi per analisi ad hoc strategiche, operative e di audit
Proposta di soluzioni innovative (modelli predittivi, automazioni, nuove fonti dati) per migliorare efficacia ed efficienza




Chi stiamo cercando

Laurea in discipline ingegneristiche, matematiche, statistiche o percorsi affini
3-5 anni di esperienza in ambito reporting, controlling, data analysis o quality analytics
Ottima padronanza di SQL e dei database relazionali, preferibilmente SQL Server
Conoscenza di SAP BusinessObjects per attività di reporting
Capacità di lavorare con grandi volumi di dati e sistemi complessi
Forte orientamento analitico, precisione, attenzione al dettaglio e problem solving
Capacità di interpretare e comunicare dati e insight in modo chiaro ed efficace
Ottime doti organizzative, capacità di gestione delle priorità e di teamworking
Conoscenza della lingua inglese, preferibilmente livello B1 o superiore
Costituiscono titolo preferenziale: esperienza con strumenti di data visualization (Power BI, Tableau, Qlik), modelli predittivi o esperienza nel settore logistico




Cosa offriamo

Modalità di lavoro ibrido: 3 giorni di smart working a settimana
Buoni pasto del valore di 8 € per ogni giorno lavorativo
Un efficiente servizio taxi che collega gli uffici alle stazioni più vicine




*Non esitare a candidarti anche se non possiedi tutti i requisiti: non sarà un algoritmo a valutare il tuo profilo, ma il nostro team di Talent Acquisition.




GLS adotta una politica di pari opportunità e si impegna a garantire un processo di selezione equo, basato sulle competenze e sul potenziale delle persone, senza discriminazioni legate a genere, orientamento sessuale, nazionalità, religione, disabilità o altre caratteristiche personali.

Title: Data Analyst
HTML:
Chi siamo

Etica Soluzioni è una software house italiana attiva da oltre 15 anni, specializzata nello sviluppo e nella commercializzazione di software gestionali proprietari.

Lavoriamo in un contesto collaborativo, con team giovani e multidisciplinari, dove le idee e il contributo operativo delle persone hanno un impatto reale sui progetti.


Cosa cerchiamo

📌 Stiamo ricercando un/a Data Analyst in vista dell'ampliamento del team AI & Analytics.


La figura selezionata, dopo un periodo di formazione e affiancamento, si occuperà di:


• monitoraggio KPI e analisi delle performance dei prodotti software;

• supporto all’integrazione di soluzioni AI all’interno dei prodotti e dei processi aziendali;

• automazione e all'ottimizzazione dei processi data-driven;

• raccolta, analisi e interpretazione di dati provenienti da diverse fonti aziendali;

• sviluppo di report e dashboard.


Requisiti richiesti

• laurea triennale in Matematica, Statistica, Informatica, Ingegneria o affini;

• esperienza di minimo 4/5 anni in ruoli analoghi;

• forte interesse per il mondo AI e data analytics;

• buona conoscenza di analisi dati e statistica;

• approccio analitico, proattività e problem solving.


Plus graditi

• buona conoscenza SQL;

• buona conoscenza di Python;

• esperienza comprovata con Power BI o strumenti di Business Intelligence similari;

• familiarità con AI generativa o Machine Learning.


Cosa offriamo

• modalità di lavoro ibrida e orario flessibile;

• contratto e retribuzione commisurati all’esperienza e al potenziale della risorsa;

• CCNL Commercio, buoni pasto da 8€;

• Psicologo aziendale;

• piani di crescita e supporto alla formazione.


🕘 Orario: full time, lunedì–venerdì (9:00–18:00)

📍 Sede di lavoro: Abbiategrasso (MI), si precisa che non si intende la fermata della metro verde, ma la città.


Per candidarsi è necessario inviare un CV aggiornato.

Le candidature in linea verranno contattate dall’Ufficio HR per un primo colloquio conoscitivo

Title: AI Engineer Intern
Description:
Company Description

At Atlante we develop EV charging stations to enable the transition towards zero-emission: empowering people to move freely in harmony with the planet. We are building Southern Europe’s largest fast and ultra-fast charging network, powered 100% by renewables. Since our launch in Italy in 2021, we serve EV-drivers at our 900+ stations across Italy, France, Spain, and Portugal.

We believe in progress, leveraging on cutting edge technology to accelerate the electric mobility revolution – especially with energy storage to enhance power from the grid. We are proud of our digital platforms that ensure ease of use and full connectivity.

We are Atlanters: a group of passionate and dedicated people always thriving to deliver a reliable service and enjoyable experience to our customers.

Position

Brief Description Of The Role

As AI Engineer Intern, you will join the Data & AI team within the CTOO group and work alongside our AI Engineer on real projects. You will contribute to the development of AI agents, help build and maintain our knowledge infrastructure, and get hands-on experience with the tools and frameworks shaping the future of applied AI. This is not a simulation; you will work on things that go into production.

Value Creation

Support Atlante's AI initiatives by contributing to agent development, knowledge base management, and tool evaluation. Bring fresh perspective and energy to the team while learning how AI gets deployed in a real business context.

Core Responsibilities


Support the development of AI agents for Operations, Finance, and Customer Service.
Help build and maintain the Knowledge Base used across AI projects.
Test and document AI tools, frameworks, and integrations.
Contribute to conversational interfaces and data access solutions.
Research new AI tools and approaches relevant to Atlante's needs.


Requirements


Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in a STEM field (Computer Science, Statistics, Engineering, Mathematics, Physics or similar).
Basic knowledge of Python.
Interest in Generative AI, LLMs, and their applications.
Curiosity to explore new tools and learn fast.
Proactive attitude, you don't wait to be told what to do.
Experience with agent frameworks, MCP, or Claude Code is a plus but not required.


Other information

Governance & Scope


Area of responsibility: Data Platform & AI Department
Geographic scope: Group-wide, with alignment to HQ
Key interactions: Data & AI team; Digital team


Why Atlante


🚀 Work on real AI projects, not exercises.
🧠 Learn from practitioners building AI solutions in production.
⚡ Fast-paced environment where you can grow quickly.
🌍 International team working on sustainable mobility.
🎯 A company that values what you deliver, not how long you've been doing it.


Location: Milan (hybrid)

If you're eager to learn AI by doing it for real, we'd like to hear from you.

This announcement is addressed to both sexes, in accordance with Law 903/77 and Legislative Decree 198/2006, and to people of all ages and nationalities, in accordance with Legislative Decrees 215/03 and 216/03

Title: Admissions Data & Digital Specialist
Description:
Job Description

We are looking for an Admissions Data & Digital Specialist to join the Admissions Office within the Students Outreach & Support Department.

Working within the Undergraduate Admissions Office, the candidate will play a role that combines business process understanding with analytical and digital expertise. The role offers the opportunity to contribute to the digital transformation of Admissions processes through data-driven decision-making and continuous innovation.

Starting from a thorough understanding of the admissions process and its alignment with the University's regulations and strategic objectives, the candidate will support the development of data-driven practices, including the design and implementation of reporting tools and dashboards and will also contribute to the evolution of digital platforms and systems supporting Admissions activities, collaborating closely with internal stakeholders and cross-functional teams.

Key Responsibilities

The role integrates three complementary areas of responsibility:


Admissions Process Management
Support the management of admissions processes, from application collection and evaluation through to admission decisions and enrollment.
Contribute to the operational management of the different phases of the admissions cycle, working closely with internal stakeholders.
Monitor process performance and ensure the quality, consistency, and compliance of admissions activities.
Data Management & Analysis
Collect, integrate, and manage data from multiple systems and sources.
Perform data cleaning, maintenance, and database structuring activities, ensuring data quality, completeness, and reliability.
Analyze data to support process monitoring and performance assessment.
Develop reports, dashboards, and analytical tools to facilitate data interpretation and decision-making.
Generate actionable insights to support the continuous improvement of Admissions processes, collaborating with internal stakeholders.
Digital Process & Platform Management
Contribute to the development, enhancement, and management of digital platforms and tools supporting Admissions processes.
Translate business needs into functional requirements for system improvements and digital initiatives.
Coordinate with colleagues and project teams involved in process optimization and digital transformation projects.
Monitor the effectiveness and proper functioning of digital platforms, supporting implementation, testing, and continuous evolution activities.


Requirements


Master's degree in Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, Business Administration, or related fields.
At least 1-2 years of experience in analytical roles/data analysis roles within structured, data-driven organizations.
Interest and motivation to develop expertise in higher education processes; previous experience in the higher education sector will be considered a plus.
Advanced knowledge of Microsoft Excel and familiarity with data analysis tools and programming languages such as SQL/MySQL and Python.
Strong ability to prepare, manage and analyze datasets, with particular attention to data quality and consistency.
Team-oriented mindset and ability to collaborate effectively on cross-functional projects.
Strong digital approach.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills in both Italian and English.
International study or work experience abroad (minimum six months).
Proven ability to manage multiple priorities, meet deadlines, and perform effectively in a fast-paced environment.
Excellent interpersonal and stakeholder management skills.
Proactive, reliable, flexible and solution-oriented approach to work.


We offer a gross annual salary starting from € 33.000,00.

The final compensation package will be defined based on the candidate’s experience, qualifications, and overall professional background, in line with the University’s fair, transparent, and non-discriminatory compensation principles.

Bocconi is an equal opportunities employer. We welcome applications from all suitably qualified candidates who can enhance our culture and working environment.

Title: Junior Data & Financial Controller (f/m/nb)
HTML:
Hai un'attitudine analitica e sei orientato al risultato?


Se hai già maturato una breve esperienza nel controllo di gestione, possiedi ottime basi di contabilità e vuoi specializzarti nell'analisi avanzata dei dati a supporto del business, questa è l'opportunità ideale per fare il salto di qualità.


Randstad professional, sub specialization Finance, sede di Milano, per realtà leader nel settore della logistica e dei trasporti su tutto il territorio nazionale, cerca un


JUNIOR DATA & FINANCIAL CONTROLLER (f/m/nb)


Si offre: inserimento a tempo indeterminato, CCNL Logistica trasporto merci e spedizioni, RAL 33-34.000€.


Benefit: ticket restaurant, smart working 1 giorno a settimana.


Orario di lavoro: full time, entrata flessibile tra le 8 e le 9.30 ed uscita tra le 17 e le 18.30, pausa pranzo flessibile da mezz'ora ad 1 ora e mezza


Luogo di lavoro: Pozzuolo Martesana MI


Di cosa ti occuperai?


Inserito nel Team Controlling e a diretto riporto del Responsabile del Controllo di Gestione, diventerai il partner analitico di riferimento per una o più Business Unit aziendali. Nello specifico ti occuperai di:


  • monitorare l'andamento economico e i costi industriali delle linee di business, elaborando report periodici (giornalieri, settimanali, mensili) sulla redditività aziendale;
  • supportare la costruzione del Budget, del Forecasting e dei preconsuntivi d’anno a stretto contatto con i Manager di funzione;
  • redigere il Conto Economico gestionale (consuntivo e previsionale) integrando le dinamiche dello Stato Patrimoniale per garantire la quadratura dei dati di business;
  • sviluppare e aggiornare cruscotti di monitoraggio (dashboard) per analizzare gli scostamenti rispetto ai target aziendali, traducendo i numeri in indicazioni strategiche per la Governance;
  • fornire supporto analitico e reportistica ad hoc per specifiche esigenze delle BU.


Quali requisiti ricerchiamo?


  • Laurea (anche triennale) in Economia, Ingegneria Gestionale o percorsi quantitativi equivalenti;
  • 1-2 anni di esperienza nel Controllo di Gestione, nel Data Analysis applicato al finance o nella contabilità industriale (la provenienza da settori dinamici come logistica, trasporti o manufacturing strutturati costituirà un plus);
  • solida comprensione delle logiche di bilancio (Conto Economico, Stato Patrimoniale e dinamiche dei costi);
  • padronanza avanzata di Excel e familiarità con moderni strumenti di Business Intelligence e analisi dati, come Power BI;
  • spiccata attitudine analitica, precisione chirurgica e puntualità nel rispetto delle scadenze (deadlines);
  • ottime doti relazionali per interfacciarsi con i vari responsabili di reparto.


Sei pronto a dare una svolta alla tua carriera in un ambiente giovane, stimolante e in forte espansione?


Inviaci la tua candidatura, non vediamo l'ora di conoscerti!


--

Il presente annuncio è rivolto a persone di genere femminile (F), maschile (M) e non binario (NB) ai sensi della Legge n. 300/1970, del Decreto Legislativo n. 198/2006 e del Decreto Legislativo n. 96/2026 ed è aperta a qualsiasi persona nel rispetto della diversity e dell'inclusività. Ti preghiamo di leggere l'informativa sulla privacy Randstad (https://www.randstad.it/privacy/) ai sensi dell'art. 13 del Regolamento (UE) 2016/679 sulla protezione dei dati (GDPR).

Title: Business Intelligence & Data Analyst - Stage
Description:
Professional Solutions srl, società del Gruppo Adecco, specializzata nella creazione e gestione di servizi in Outsourcing a livello nazionale e che opera, in particolar modo, nei settori Field Marketing, BPO e Logistics & Manufacturing, ad oggi ricerca un/una:




Business Intelligence & Data Analyst - Stage




La risorsa selezionata sarà inserita all’interno di un importante progetto strutturato e contribuirà attivamente alle attività di analisi dei dati e supporto decisionale, collaborando con i team operativi e di business.

Sarà di supporto al team nelle attività di raccolta, analisi e interpretazione dei dati, con l’obiettivo di migliorare i processi e le performance aziendali.




Attività:

Raccolta, analisi e interpretazione dei dati provenienti da diverse fonti
Supporto nella creazione e manutenzione di reportistica e dashboard
Analisi KPI e monitoraggio delle performance operative
Supporto alle attività di forecasting e pianificazione
Collaborazione con i team interfunzionali per garantire la qualità del dato
Utilizzo di strumenti di Business Intelligence per l’elaborazione e visualizzazione dei dati




Requisiti:

Laurea in discipline Informatiche, Statistiche, Economiche o affini
Ottima conoscenza del pacchetto Office, in particolare Excel
Conoscenza di Power BI (considerata un plus)
Buone capacità analitiche e di problem solving
Precisione, organizzazione e attenzione al dettaglio
Attitudine al lavoro in team
Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese




Si offre

Stage della durata iniziale di 6 mesi, con possibilità di proroga.
Rimborso spese mensile di 600 euro, buoni pasto di 6 euro al giorno e strumenti aziendali.

Title: Corporate Finance Process Controller
Description:
We are Hiring 🌍




Mapei is looking for a Corporate Finance Process Controller to join our Finance & Controlling team and support the continuous improvement, harmonization, and governance of our financial processes across the Group.

A Corporate Finance Process Controller is expected to design, monitor, and improve financial processes across the organization. This includes ensuring that all finance workflows are standardized, compliant, and efficient.




🔍 Key Responsibilities

Mapping and documenting finance processes
Ensuring process compliance across countries/business units
Identifying inefficiencies and implementing improvements
Ensuring data accuracy and consistency across systems
Monitoring adherence to corporate finance policies
Collaborate with IT on system enhancements, testing, and alignment of finance processes with ERP functionalities
Performing process checks and variance investigations
Provide guidance and training to local finance teams on corporate standards and process updates.




🎯 What We Are Looking For




5+ years of experience in accounting, controlling, or financial process analysis.
Strong understanding of financial processes (closing, reporting, budgeting, forecasting).
Familiarity with ERP systems.
Analytical mindset, attention to detail, and strong problem‑solving skills.
Ability to work cross‑functionally in an international environment.
Experience in the manufacturing sector is a strong plus.
Fluent English; additional languages are an advantage.
Mandatory availability to travel internationally.




💼 Welfare & Benefits

At Mapei, we are committed to supporting the well‑being and work–life balance of our people.

Our benefits include:

Smart working
Corporate welfare
Ticket Restaurant
Health and pension insurance coverage




📨 How to Apply

If you are passionate about finance processes, continuous improvement, and working in a global industrial context, we would be happy to receive your application.

👉 Apply directly via LinkedIn

Title: Junior Associate
Description:
Who You'll Work With

Driving lasting impact and building long-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture - doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.

In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.

When you join us, you will have:


Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.
A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.
Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.


Your Impact

As a junior associate, you will join a client service team and take ownership of a workstream to solve some of the toughest challenges our clients face.

And these aren’t just any clients—they're some of the most influential organizations around, from Fortune 500 giants to innovative startups. We will expect you to go the extra mile, delivering solutions that solve immediate problems and drive long-term change. And we’ll rely on your judgment and integrity to ensure our recommendations are effective and long-lasting.

You will take on a role that goes beyond advising. You’ll be at the heart of the action—helping to uncover the true challenges behind a client’s strategy and creating actionable plans that drive real change. Working alongside clients and other McKinsey colleagues, you’ll combine research, analyzing data, interviews, and brainstorming to generate fresh insights and breakthrough solutions. Your commitment to our values will be crucial in earning our clients' trust and delivering results that matter.

As you collaborate directly with clients, you’ll help them solve problems, refine strategies, and implement transformations. By equipping them with the tools and knowledge to continue innovating and improving after we’ve left, you’ll ensure the impact of our work endures. In doing so, you’ll uphold McKinsey’s commitment to making a meaningful difference in the industries and communities we serve.

Your Qualifications and Skills


Degree / education requirements vary by country or practice.
Excellent organization capabilities, including the ability to initiate tasks independently and see them through to completion.
Strong communication skills, both verbal and written, in English and local office language(s), with the ability to adjust your style to suit different perspectives and seniority levels.
Proficient in rational decision making based on data, facts, and logical reasoning.
Ability to create work product-focused materials / outputs, which may include PowerPoint decks, Excel models, articles, or other written deliverables.
Exceptional time management to meet your responsibilities in a complex and largely autonomous work environment.
Ability to work or attend meetings outside of traditional business hours or take on projects with limited or no notice at times.
Ability to travel to and work in varying environments that may be challenging and/or not accessible (e.g., factories, hospitals, mines).

Title: Global Analytics & Insights - Junior Analyst
Description:
Generali is one of the largest global insurance and asset management providers. Established in 1831, it is present in 50 countries in the world the Generali Group is one of the most significant players in the global insurance and the asset management industry. Generali supports each firm to innovate and grow with full investment autonomy ensuring they are set up to develop sustainable and innovative solutions. With the stability of Generali Group backing, the platform enables investors to access distinctive strategies and experts' insights.




Generali Employee Benefits (GEB) Network is now Redion, a Generali Company.




We are Redion. This is not a new company or a restructuring. This is our new global name — one brand for Europ Assistance and Generali Employee Benefits (GEB) Network, bringing together our insurance, assistance, and employee benefits services worldwide. Our vision: to be the world’s premier care partner.

Redion Employee Benefits is the global platform dedicated to the human capital of multinational corporations and, following the acquisition of Swiss Life Network earlier in 2026, the undisputed worldwide leader in employee benefits.







For more information, please visit our website www.redion.com/eb







** We are looking for 2 Junior Analysts to join our Global Analytics & Insights Team. Application must be submitted in English. **







The Junior Analyst, within the Global Analytics & Insights Team, will be responsible for consolidating and analysing financial and operational data for our Multinational Clients. This role involves collaborating with internal business groups, operations teams, and external managers to enhance the customer experience with regards to their financial results. The Junior Analyst will execute client reports, troubleshoot data anomalies, and compile concise narratives for results prior to distribution to key business partners.

You will join a fast-paced, international environment within a young and dynamic team that strongly values onboarding, knowledge sharing, and collaboration - because we believe we achieve more together. Fluency in English is essential; additional languages are considered a strong asset.




Key responsibilities (non-exhaustive list):

Receive, manage and administer data regarding pool, captive clients and prepare their annual and quarterly reports
Analyse, inform and explain data of pool and captive clients to the Account Executives and Client Development Managers in the commercial office
Assist in informing and explaining data of pool and captive clients to the internal and external auditors
Responsible for the update of the pool and captive documentation (contracts, agreements)
Manage the captive warranties (extending to the letter of credit, change of guarantee or change of level...)
Identify, suggest and coordinate any necessary developments that are required to support business needs/expansions. This will include preparation of Business Requirements documentation, coordination with internal/external stakeholders




The above list is not limitative and may be amended/adapted at any time by the Employer, at its own discretion, in accordance with the business needs.







What we are looking for candidates with

strong ability (and willingness) to work with figures
strong analytical skills and high level of computer literacy, mainly in Excel, PowerPoint and Word
proactive attitude and able to anticipate the consequences of every decision taken (this comes with time & exposure but it is definitively what the incumbent will have to show)
ability to work under pressure with tight deadlines while delivering a high-quality work
a team oriented approach but still able to work independently







Ideal background would be

1 to 3 years of experience in a role combining data management, analytics and providing insights
combined with a degree in Quantitative field (Mathematics, Actuarial Sciences, Economics and Finance or similar)
knowledge/experience of life insurance or reinsurance is definitively a major asset
















Redion Employee Benefits’ commitment for recruiting:

Redion Employee Benefits is committed to promote equal opportunities in employment. Candidates will receive equal treatment regardless of age, disability, gender reassignment, marital or civil partner status, pregnancy or maternity, race, color, nationality, ethnic or national origin, religion or belief, sex or sexual orientation.

At Generali and Redion, we believe that it is our differences that make the difference. At the heart of everything we do, we value the fact that we are all human beings, unique in our own ways, bringing different cultures, lifestyles, mindsets, and preferences. Our commitment is to leverage this Diversity to create long-term value, to be innovative, sustainable, to make the difference for our people, our clients, our partners as well as our communities. We strive to promote a culture where D&I is embedded in how we work and do business every day. All of us around the world are taking actions every day to create an inclusive and accessible workplace, where every person feels empowered to take ownership, to challenge biases and lead the transformation with a human touch.




Redion Employee Benefits endeavours to contact candidates within 21 days of application. However, if you do not hear back after 3 weeks then please assume on this occasion, unfortunately, you have not been successful.




Personal data collected will be strictly used for recruitment purpose only. All unsuccessful applications will be destroyed max. 3 months after this recruitment campaign closing.




You can consult our candidate’s Privacy notice here: https://www.geb.com/privacy-notice-job-applicants

Title: Data & AI Consultant - INTERNSHIP - Milano
Description:
Vuoi essere al centro di prospettive di crescita uniche?
Entra nella practice Advisory - Data & Cloud di PwC e diventa:"Junior Data & AI Consultant

Your Perspectives

Prenderai parte a diversi progetti di trasformazione del business all'interno di settori quali Automotive & Industrial Manufacturing, Consumer Markets, Energy & Utilities, Financial Services, Telco & Media attraverso l’efficientamento e la reingegnerizzazione dei processi interni.
Grazie all’accesso alle vaste competenze del nostro network internazionale, potrai dare spazio alle tue idee e fornire il contributo innovativo che hai sempre desiderato.

Parteciperai a progetti di consulenza e maturerai esperienza su tematiche di Data Warehouse, Big Data, Business Intelligence, Data Science, Machine Learning & Artificial Intelligence.

Aiuterai le aziende con cui collaboriamo ad esplorare nuove opportunità di business attraverso le seguenti attività:
Costruzione di architetture Big Data, implementazione di soluzioni di Data Warehouse, analisi dei dati e rappresentazione degli stessi, attraverso l’utilizzo di tool dedicati
Valutazione delle strutture organizzative di presidio e gestione dei dati nelle organizzazioni
Attività e progetti in ambito Data Visualization;
Per la posizione di Data Scientist sarai coinvolto sia nella progettazione che nello sviluppo di Decision Support System basati su engine di Machine Learning, Deep Learning e Reinforcement Learning.
Your unique strengths

● Hai conseguito o stai conseguendo una laurea magistrale in ambito informatico, ingegneristico o economico-statistico
● Parli e scrivi in inglese fluentemente
● Sei in grado di trovare soluzioni funzionali e innovative a progetti complessi
● Hai una forte passione per il mondo IT e gli strumenti tecnologici non hanno segreti per te
● Sai lavorare per obiettivi e metterti in gioco con passione
● Hai l'attitudine da team worker e hai buone capacità relazionali e comunicative
● Hai sempre la valigia pronta anche per un viaggio di lavoro e una spinta rivolta al mondo della consulenza

Set your expectation higher: 
 PwC ti sorprenderà e ti farà sentire al centro della società, dell’innovazione e del cambiamento. Il tuo talento e la tua curiosità avranno tutto lo spazio che meritano e contribuirai a garantire la qualità dei servizi che offriamo al nostro interno. In questo percorso di crescita sarai accompagnato da un gruppo esperto e da una formazione continua e su misura grazie alla quale potrai mettere le tue competenze a disposizione della clientela

Set your expectation higher: 
 PwC ti sorprenderà e ti farà sentire al centro della società, dell’innovazione e del cambiamento. Il tuo talento e la tua curiosità avranno tutto lo spazio che meritano e contribuirai a garantire la qualità dei servizi che offriamo al nostro interno. In questo percorso di crescita sarai accompagnato da un gruppo esperto e da una formazione continua e su misura grazie alla quale potrai mettere le tue competenze a disposizione della clientela

Title: Junior Trainee Employment Law
Description:
Who we are



Within our approachable, friendly, and team-based way of working, you will collaborate with the Team that advises major domestic and international companies on public and private M&A, disposals, demergers, joint ventures, restructurings, corporate governance, regulatory compliance and Antitrust advisory with a particular focus on complex cross-border transactions.



We were one of the first international law firms to open offices in Italy – Rome in 1993 and Milan in 1994. We know the Italian market very well and have long experience of cross-border deals.



We have invested in our Italian offices and we are now one of the few firms who can offer clients a full-service capability. Our team of approximately 100 lawyers comprises professionals qualified to practice in Italy, the UK, and the US and all our lawyers are permanently based in Italy.



Our firm, work and people span jurisdictions, cultures and languages. In a world where commercial success increasingly relies on globalisation, we offer clients a truly international perspective.



Over the last decades we have been working on landmark deals and high-profile cases – among them in 1990s the privatisations of Banca di Roma, BNL and Alitalia. These transactions and our way of working – teams of lawyers led by highly-experienced partners – helped to change the landscape of the Italian legal market. More recently, we have worked on a number of innovative deals involving Autostrade per l'Italia, Telepass and Arcaplanet.









Job Description



Our experienced Employment Team works with clients from a wide range of sectors to address local and cross-border issues.



We not only cover the traditional areas of Employment law that many firms focus on, but also more specialist areas that are increasingly relevant in the current financial climate, such as remuneration reform, regulatory investigations and corporate governance.



Clients, ranging from global businesses to small enterprises, have come to trust and rely on the experience of our dedicated teams based across our network of offices. To help clients keep on top of the risks and opportunities arising from changes in the law, we track and anticipate the latest legislative proposals in the jurisdictions that are important to their business.



You will be given the chance to handle a variety of work and you will closely collaborate with our Employment lawyers and clients.



Specifically you will work together with the Employment Team in activities related to:



- Advisory (such as work councils and unions, D&I, boardroom and senior executive issues, employment contracts)



- Transactional (such as employment aspects of M&A, outsourcings, relocations and restructurings)



- Remuneration



- Corporate Governance



- Employee incentives





Qualifications



You will ideally be a newly graduated in Italian Law with a brief experience in the Employment Practice Area of a Law Firm and with a strong passion for labour/employment law.



You addressed your studies in Labour topics (for example you have written your thesis in labour law; you have participated in courses / seminars related to labour law; you have had some short internship experience in teams that dealt with labour law).



You will be a self-starter with a strong academic background, a team player with strong communication, analytical and drafting skills, able to manage different work-streams.This should be high level and include a clear indicate of what experience may be relevant but should avoid demanding academic qualifications that are not necessary for the r



An excellent knowledge of written and spoken English is mandatory.





Additional Information



From your first day with us, you will have varied opportunities to continuously grow and development your skills and knowledge. From formal training, informal coaching and mentoring through to skills-based and technical training and on the job learning.

Title: Filmmaker Internship (Sede Milano)
Description:
Ciaopeople è un gruppo editoriale, leader in Italia nel campo digitale.

Editore di Fanpage.it, Cookist, Geopop, The Jackal, Metamostri e Deepinto, opera nell’informazione online, nella produzione multimediale e nell’entertainment.

Ciaopeople ha sedi a Milano, Roma e Napoli.

Posizione:

Per la nostra sede di Milano siamo alla ricerca di una persona da inserire nel team di Video Production che risponda al ruolo di

Creative Filmmaker intern

Il team si occupa di produzioni video complesse, seguendo ogni fase del processo: dall’ideazione allo shooting, fino alla post-produzione, offrendo supporto ai diversi team aziendali nella gestione dei set e nell’ottimizzazione dei workflow video.

Unendo skill di programmazione, AI, 3D, compositing e filmmaking, il team realizza video unici e supporta i creators e le redazioni interne a esprimere al massimo il loro potenziale.

Di cosa ti occuperai?


supporto alla pre-produzione;
riprese video e allestimento set;
montaggio video;
copywriting e storytelling creativo;
assistenza alla formazione alle redazioni e ai creators del gruppo;
supporto nell’ideazione di concept creativi;
creazione di contenuti per i social (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube).


Requisiti:

Requisiti Richiesti:


conoscenza delle tecniche di ripresa con reflex/mirrorless Sony;
conoscenza delle tecniche di direzione della fotografia;
conoscenza della microfonazione in presa diretta;
conoscenza del pacchetto Adobe, in particolare Adobe Premiere.


Requisiti Preferenziali:


conoscenza di software per compositing, vfx, animazione e modellazione 3D (Blender);
conoscenza delle tecniche di AI applicate ai video.
conoscenza relativa alla modalità di realizzazione di live YouTube / Twitch / Podcast


Abilità richieste:


capacità di lavorare in team;
problem solving.


Altre informazioni:

Perché dovresti fare application?

In Ciaopeople crediamo che il potere della condivisione sia in grado di creare valore e generare il cambiamento.

Con questa esperienza potrai entrare a far parte di una realtà che ha rivoluzionato il mondo dell’editoria e della creazione dei contenuti, con possibilità di crescita ed apprendimento non solo con il tuo team di riferimento ma anche con il costante confronto con i tuoi colleghi…il tutto, divertendoti!

Allora, cosa stai aspettando?

Altre informazioni:

Sede di inserimento: Milano

Tipologia di inserimento: stage con compenso mensile

Title: STAGE BACK OFFICE & DATA ANALYST (ID-106848)
Company: AFOL Milano -Agenzia per la formazione, l'orientamento e il lavoro
HTML:
TIPOLOGIA DI CONTRATTO: STAGE 12 MESI SCOPO ASSUNZIONE

SEDE DI LAVORO: MILANO DUOMO (MI)

La risorsa, per Fiduciaria Giardini, società indipendente attiva attiva da oltre 40 anni nell'amministrazione patrimoniale e fiduciaria entrerà in contatto diretto con i principali processi operativi e sarà coinvolta nelle attività quotidiane di gestione amministrativa, bancaria e finanziaria, con l'obiettivo di sviluppare competenze concrete e trasversali nel settore, occupandosi delle seguenti mansioni:

  • Supporto operativo al regolamento di operazioni di compravendita di strumenti finanziari;
  • Inserimento contabili e aggiornamento dati ai fini amministrativi e fiscali;
  • Supporto nel calcolo delle imposte su mandati fiduciari e nelle attività di chiusura delle posizioni;
  • Riconciliazioni giornaliere e mensile di saldi e titoli con controparti bancarie;
  • Gestione operativa di corporate actions, incasso cedole e dividendi;
  • Gestione di apporti e prelievi cash e titoli;
  • Supporto nelle attività di apertura mandati fiduciari, conti correnti e polizze assicurative;
  • Supporto amministrativo nella gestione di quote societarie;
  • Affiancamento al team nelle attività di controllo, archiviazione e organizzazione documentale


PROFILO IDEALE: si richiede il possesso dei seguenti requisiti:

  • Interesse per un ruolo operativo e amministrativo;
  • Attenzione al dettaglio e precisione;
  • Predisposizione a lavorare in team;
  • Minima esperienza nel ruolo;
  • Diploma o laurea in ambito economico, amministrativo o finanziario;
  • Conoscenza di Excel.


ORARIO DI LAVORO E CCNL: Full Time 40 ore settimanali 9.00/18.00 lun- ven - Commeercio

RETRIBUZIONE: € 1.000 rimborso spese mensile, buoni pasto da € 8 al gg, percorso di formazione pratica e affiancamento diretto, piano welfare successivo al percorso post stage.

L'offerta è rivolta a tutte le persone nel rispetto delle pari opportunità di genere, diversità e inclusione (ai sensi Dlgs 198/2006, 215/2003 e 216/2003)

Title: Data Analytics Specialist
Description:
Job Title: Data Analytics Specialist

Location: Cormano, Lombardy, Italy

Type: Full Time




Our client is looking for a talented Data Analytics Specialist to strengthen its data capabilities in Italy. This role plays a key part in shaping the local data landscape, connecting technical expertise with business strategy to drive impactful decision-making.

Based in a hybrid setup in Milan, the position offers the opportunity to contribute directly to the growth of one of Italy’s leading food delivery and grocery platforms, working within a collaborative and innovation-driven environment.




Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and manage end-to-end ELT pipelines and scalable data models in a production setting
Maintain and enhance the organization’s semantic data layer to ensure consistency and accuracy across reporting tools
Apply advanced statistical techniques, including causal analysis, to measure the impact of marketing initiatives and operational changes
Establish and uphold data governance practices to ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency
Translate technical data frameworks into actionable insights for senior stakeholders, including country leadership
Continuously improve existing systems by experimenting with new tools, methodologies, and data solutions




Technical Skills

Strong expertise in SQL and Python, with experience building scalable and well-structured data solutions
Hands-on experience with tools such as BigQuery, dbt, and semantic layer frameworks
Solid grounding in statistics, with a keen interest in applying causal inference techniques to business challenges
Strong focus on clean code, maintainable systems, and robust data architecture




Personal Attributes

Growth-oriented mindset with the ability to take ownership of complex, end-to-end projects
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills
Ability to communicate complex data insights clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences
Collaborative approach with the ability to work across local and global teams
Fluency in both Italian and English

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Onze klant is een jonge en ambitieuze speler binnen de internationale sector van magazijnautomatisatie. Achter de schermen van grote, complexe logistieke processen zorgen zij dat alles feilloos verloopt door middel van slimme software en geavanceerde IoT-oplossingen. De sfeer op de werkvloer is open en ondernemend, waardoor innovatieve ideeën direct gehoor krijgen en fouten maken simpelweg gezien wordt als een leermoment.




Door complexe datastromen om te zetten in heldere inzichten, help je mee de toekomst van wereldwijde supply chains vorm te geven. Je komt terecht in een hecht team van software-architecten en developers die samen bouwen aan schaalbare, betrouwbare systemen. Ben jij klaar om als data analyst de data-infrastructuur naar een hoger niveau te tillen? Getriggerd? Lees dan snel verder!




Takenpakket

In deze rol neem jij het voortouw bij het structureren van complexe, operationele data uit hoogtechnologische omgevingen. Jouw dag draait om het bouwen van de perfecte analytische transformatielaag.

Je vertaalt functionele KPI-eisen naar loepzuivere berekeningsregels, zodat het management strategische beslissingen baseert op de juiste data.
Door het ontwerpen van slimme datamodellen en transformatielogica zorg je voor een datastructuur die ook op de lange termijn herbruikbaar blijft.
Met behulp van gerichte Python-scripts en geavanceerde SQL-queries optimaliseer je de database-inrichting voor maximale prestaties.
Je implementeert strenge validatieregels en kwaliteitscontroles, waardoor inconsistenties in de datastromen direct proactief worden opgevangen en opgelost.
In nauw overleg met software architects en DevOps-collega's integreer je versiebeheer om stabiele releases te garanderen.




Profiel

Als data analyst stel je kritische vragen over de herkomst van cijfers en rust je niet voor alles logisch klopt.

Ervaring met data engineering, business intelligence of een soortgelijke technische rol waarin je minstens drie jaar actief bent.
Je beschekt over een uitstekende kennis van SQL en hebt een scherp inzicht in relationele databases en datamodellering.
Collega's omschrijven jou als een analytische denker die vlot communiceert in het Engels en graag over de grenzen van het eigen team heen kijkt.
Affiniteit met of interesse in logistieke processen helpt je om de operationele context sneller te begrijpen.




Aanbod

Wanneer je start als data analyst, krijg je direct de ruimte om impact te maken. Wat mag je concreet verwachten van deze internationale werkgever?

Een aantrekkelijk brutoloon dat perfect aansluit bij jouw ervaring en technische expertise.
Een moderne bedrijfswagen inclusief tankkaart of laadpas voor zorgeloze kilometers, zowel voor werk als privé.
Uitstekende flexibiliteit met de vrijheid om je eigen werkuren in te delen, zodat je kunt werken op de momenten dat jij het meest productief bent.
Maar liefst 32 vakantiedagen per jaar dankzij een fulltime 40-urenweek, waardoor je werk en privé perfect in balans blijven.
Een solide groeps- en hospitalisatieverzekering voor een optimale medische en financiële bescherming van jou en je gezin.
Maaltijdcheques van € 8 per gewerkte dag en nette onkostenvergoedingen die je maandelijkse netto-inkomen extra boosten.
Een mooie jaarlijkse CAO90 bonus wanneer de gezamenlijke organisatiedoelen worden behaald.
Een intensief opleidingstraject door ervaren collega's uit het vak, waardoor je jouw vaardigheden als Analytics Engineer continu aanscherpt.
Up-to-date werkmateriaal waaronder een high-end laptop en een iPhone met bijhorend abonnement.




Zie jij jezelf al schitteren in deze rol van Analytics Engineer?

Geprikkeld door dit verhaal? Solliciteer direct en we plannen een eerste kennismaking in.

Title: Data & Simulation Specialist
Description:
Cartamundi is wereldmarktleider in “play”-oplossingen. Denk aan speelkaarten, kaart- en bordspellen, collectibles en trading card games.

Ons doel? “Live Different, Play Different” voor iedereen. Met bijna 3.000 mensen zetten we ons elke dag in om die ambitie waar te maken. Ons familiebedrijf, met hoofdkantoor in België, heeft daarvoor een wereldwijd netwerk van designcenters, verkoopkantoren en productiefaciliteiten. Een netwerk dat loopt van de VS en Brazilië tot Europa en Japan.

Cartamundi heeft een wereldwijde merkenportefeuille met heritage brands zoals Bicycle®, Bee®, Copag®, Shuffle® en heel wat lokaal geliefde merken. We zijn ook de vertrouwde partner van toonaangevende speelgoed- en entertainmentbedrijven voor productie- en distributieoplossingen.

De drukpersen van Cartamundi draaien al sinds 1765. We koppelen die rijke traditie aan innovatie in digitale en hybride speelervaringen. Om zo relevant te blijven – vandaag en morgen.

Cartamundi voert een strategie van duurzame en winstgevende groei. Op die manier streven we ernaar om onze planeet en ons bedrijf in topconditie te houden voor de komende generaties.




Lees meer op www.cartamundi.com

Volg ons op LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/cartamundi




Data & Simulation Analyst

Als Data & Simulation Analyst ben je verantwoordelijk voor het vertalen van complexe en unieke klantbehoeften naar correcte, efficiënte en productieklare collatieschema’s voor collectible kaartenproducten.

Je zorgt ervoor dat alle kaartvarianten in de juiste aantallen, samenstellingen en configuraties in flowpacks, decks en displays terechtkomen, in lijn met zowel klantverwachtingen als productietechnische mogelijkheden.




Jouw functie

Met jouw analytische blik en technische feeling…




…Vertaal je klantbehoeften naar haalbare oplossingen

Je analyseert klantwensen en adviseert op basis van technische en statistische inzichten.




…Ontwerp je collatieschema’s van A tot Z

Je ontwikkelt vorm-, lay‑out- en dropschema’s en zorgt voor correcte kaartcombinaties.
Je maakt scenario­berekeningen voor duidelijke keuzes en alternatieven.




…Lever je sterke simulaties en analyses

Je bouwt displaysimulaties op basis van kansberekening.
Je maakt impactanalyses en rapporten die beslissingen ondersteunen.




…Bewaak je data en kwaliteit

Title: Analytics Engineer
Description:
Movu Robotics, part of the stow Group, is on its way to becoming a global leader in the design, development and implementation of warehouse automation solutions. Its cutting-edge technology is redefining supply chain efficiency.

Movu offers an integrated ecosystem of scalable and innovative solutions, making it easier for warehouse operators to implement robotic automation solutions.

If you want to grow as a professional, we have a warm place waiting for you at Movu Robotics.




At Movu, we value your strengths, because they are our strengths too.




We are a dynamic global company looking for passionate people to help us innovate at every level.







💡 As an Analytics Engineer, you will take ownership of the analytical transformation layer and the KPI calculation logic.

Your main responsibilities will include:

Structuring and modelling operational data from warehouse automation environments.
Translating validated KPI requirements into precise calculation rules.
Defining KPI granularity, filters, exclusions, time windows, data sources and interpretation limits.
Building and maintaining reliable transformation logic.
Working on database structuring and creating small Python scripts when needed.
Implementing data quality checks, validation rules and reconciliation logic.
Documenting KPI definitions, calculation assumptions and known limitations.
Ensuring that data models and KPI rules are version-controlled, tested and reusable.
Collaborating with software architects, DevOps, full-stack developers and operational stakeholders.







📍 We are looking for a profile with at least 3 to 5 years of experience in one of the following areas:

Analytics Engineering
Data Engineering
BI Engineering with strong technical depth
Technical Data Analyst role with genuine data ownership




You ideally bring:

Strong SQL skills.
Good understanding of databases and data modelling.
Experience in defining and structuring KPIs.
Ability to work with operational, process-oriented or event-driven data.
Experience with data quality, validation rules and documentation.
Familiarity with Git, version control, testing or CI/CD practices.
Ability to create small Python scripts when needed.
Fluent English is required.




Experience with OLAP databases, event-driven data, IoT, warehouse automation, supply chain, logistics, MQTT or industrial data environments will be considered a strong plus.







😅 What this role is not

This is not a purely Power BI or dashboarding role.

We are not looking for someone who only consumes data or produces visual reports.




We are looking for someone who is able to understand how data is produced, transformed, controlled and made reliable.

The right person will naturally ask the right questions:

Where does this data come from?
Can we trust this number?
What exactly does this KPI measure?
Which data should be excluded?
How can we prove that the calculation is correct?
How can we make this logic reusable and scalable?







What do we offer you?

A place in an enthusiastic, young organisation with the necessary ambitions
The necessary freedom and opportunity to take initiative.
An intensive training by experienced people.
An attractive salary in an international environment with many benefits:
Company car with fuel card/charging pass
Group & health insurance
Meal vouchers (8€)
Net allowances
CAO90 Bonus
Laptop
iPhone + subscription
20 days of vacation plus 12 extra days for working a full year on 40h-workweek instead of 38h (32 leave days in total)
Satellite office in Berchem ( Antwerp )
Show more

Title: Data Integration Analyst
Description:
De Data Integration Analyst is verantwoordelijk voor het opzetten en analyseren van de applicatielogbestanden van meerdere toepassingen (een mix van in-house software en externe software), evenals de operationele data in verschillende systemen. Dit gebeurt in het kader van de herontwerp- en automatiseringsinitiatieven binnen onze terminaloperaties (het Emerald project).




Rol:

Het onderhouden en uitbreiden van de Dynatrace-omgeving zodat data uit de verschillende applicaties correct kan worden ingelezen
Het koppelen van data uit die applicaties om cross-applicatie analyses te kunnen uitvoeren, met als doel problemen in terminal- of applicatieperformantie te detecteren en hun oorzaken te achterhalen
Het bouwen en uitbreiden van dashboards (een continu proces van verdere verrijking) om zowel softwarekwaliteit als operationele terminalperformantie inzichtelijk te maken
Proactief datamining uitvoeren: verder gaan dan standaard query’s door je natuurlijke drang om data te onderzoeken en te verrijken
Het bepalen van de operationele performantie van de terminal in de testomgeving, en oorzaken zoeken wanneer de performantie niet voldoet aan de verwachtingen
Het beoordelen van de algemene softwarekwaliteit en trends vaststellen tussen versies, bijvoorbeeld op basis van foutcodes
Overleggen met het Software-, Operations-, Equipment- en Operations Support-team om hen te ondersteunen in hun noden rond data-analyse




Deze rol maakt deel uit van het Operational Support Team, dat diensten levert aan het Emerald Project Team.




Profiel:

Opleiding:

Bachelor in Computerwetenschappen (of gelijkwaardig door ervaring)




Ervaring:

• Minstens 3 jaar ervaring in het opbouwen en/of runnen van een veeleisende en dynamische data-analyseomgeving

• Eerdere ervaring met Dynatrace is een groot pluspunt

• Ervaring met SQL, Power BI en datamodellering is een troef

• Een goed begrip van processen binnen containerterminals en TOS-systemen is sterk gewenst




Talen:

Uitstekende kennis van het Engels; sterke voorkeur voor vloeiend Nederlands.

Competenties:

Analytisch ingesteld, met aandacht voor goed gedocumenteerd werk
Sterke organisatorische en coördinatievaardigheden
Goede communicatieskills en een kritische mindset
Zelfstarter met een hands-on mentaliteit
Teamplayer die graag werkt in een snel veranderende omgeving met uitdagende taken, binnen een snelgroeiende organisatie




Wat bieden wij?

Je komt terecht in een resultaatgericht team in een uitdagende, no-nonsense en boeiende omgeving met collega's gericht op expertise, teamwork en open communicatie. Wij bieden je interessante mogelijkheden voor persoonlijke ontwikkeling en trainingen via onze PSA Academy. Met een goede balans tussen werk en privé. We maken deel uit van de PSA Group, een toonaangevende wereldwijde havenoperator met een regionaal hoofdkantoor in Antwerpen, die een open kennisuitwisseling tussen technische experts bevordert.




Over ons

PSA International behoort tot één van de grootste havengroepen ter wereld gespecialiseerd in container behandeling. Het Belgische PSA, de grootste investering van PSA buiten Singapore, behandelt meer dan 80% van alle containers die in Antwerpen aankomen en vertrekken. Vandaag kan PSA in de Antwerpse haven bogen op de ervaring en expertise van ruim 3.600 personeelsleden om de complexe operaties vlot te beheren.

Title: Data Analist / Data Quality Analist
Description:
Binnen BESIX Infra Support bouwen we aan een moderne, data-gedreven organisatie. Onze ploegen, projectleiders, planners, finance en aankoopteams vertrouwen dagelijks op correcte data om operationele processen efficiënt te ondersteunen. Met de migratie van Navision naar Business Central investeren we in de toekomst, en zoeken we versterking om kwaliteit, structuur en stabiliteit van onze data te waarborgen.

Daarom versterken we ons team met een Data Analist / Data Quality Analist die wil meehelpen aan een strategische transformatie.




Vacatureomschrijving

Als Data Analist / Data Quality Analist speel je een sleutelrol in het begrijpen, verbeteren en bewaken van onze data. Je werkt nauw samen met Business Analysts, Data Stewards, IT en verschillende afdelingen (Finance, Planning, HR, Fleet, Projectleiding). Je helpt de organisatie om data correct te interpreteren, te structureren en te benutten in het kader van:

ERP-migratie (NAV → Business Central)
Masterdata-opbouw
Rapportering en operationele processen
Datakwaliteit en governance

Je bent zowel analytisch als communicatief sterk. Je kan diep in data duiken, maar ook helder en pragmatisch uitleggen wat de impact is voor de business.

1. Data Analyse & Profiling

Analyseren van brondata uit NAV/4PS en andere systemen.
Uitvoeren van dataprofiling om kwaliteit, structuur en inconsistenties te begrijpen.
Detecteren van fouten, duplicaten, ontbrekende waarden en afwijkingen.
Opstellen van aanbevelingen voor datacontroles, remediation en kwaliteitsverbetering.
Gebruik van Power BI om datakwaliteit te visualiseren (completeness %, duplicate rates, invalid values).
Ondersteunen van migratieactiviteiten zoals mapping, validatiereeksen en cleaning scripts.

2. Data Governance & Kwaliteitsprocessen

Meewerken aan datadefinities, naming conventions en datastandaarden.
Uitbouwen en onderhouden van een datacatalogus en data lineage documentatie.
Opstellen van datakwaliteitsregels en controles (accuracy, completeness, consistency, timeliness).
Bewaken van datastromen en ondersteunen van data stewards bij hun verantwoordelijkheden.
Uitwerken van praktische documentatie die door niet-technische afdelingen kan worden gebruikt.

3. Business- & Stakeholdercommunicatie

Complexe data-oplossingen vertalen naar heldere, bruikbare informatie.
Nauwe samenwerking met Business Analysts voor functionele en technische alignering.
Duidelijk communiceren met business stakeholders zoals werfleiding, HR, aankoop, planning en finance.
Actief bijdragen aan een constructieve, oplossingsgerichte cultuur.

Functie-eisen

Technische kennis

Sterke ervaring met SQL is vereist.
Ervaring met Python is een pluspunt.
Vaardig met Power BI en BI-rapportering.
Begrip van ERP-datamodellen en migratieprocessen (NAV/4PS, Business Central).
Ervaring met data quality rules, profiling en cleansing.
Inzicht in metadata, governance en datacatalogi.

Analytische vaardigheden

Sterk analytisch en probleemoplossend denkvermogen.
Kunnen werken met grote en complexe datasets.
Systematisch en gestructureerd te werk gaan.
End-to-end impactanalyses kunnen uitvoeren.

Soft skills

Communicatief sterk en helder in uitleg.
Proactief en oplossingsgericht.
Ownership nemen, verantwoordelijkheid dragen en zelfstandig vooruitgang boeken.
Samenwerken in multidisciplinaire teams.
Flexibel omgaan met verandering en onvolledige informatie.

Wat verwachten we qua achtergrond?

Bachelor of Master in data-analyse, statistiek, informatica, economie of gelijkwaardig door ervaring.
Ervaring in organisaties met veel operationele flows (bouw, logistiek, industrie) is een plus.
Relevante ervaring als data-analist of data-kwaliteitsspecialist is een troef.
Ervaring in ERP-trajecten of digitale transformaties is een voordeel.

Wat bieden we?

Een strategische rol in een cruciaal transformatietraject.
Nauwe samenwerking met Business Analysts, Data Stewards en ERP-projectteams.
Werken in een omgeving waar pragmatiek, ownership en teamwork centraal staan.
De mogelijkheid om datakwaliteit, governance en procesoptimalisaties mee uit te bouwen.
Een sterke impact op de toekomst van data binnen BESIX in Schelle.

Aanvullende informatie

Je komt terecht in een groeiend bedrijf waar de grootste succesfactor het enthousiasme en de creativiteit van de eigen medewerkers is. Wij bieden jou:

Een voltijdse vaste functie met afwisseling en verantwoordelijkheid.
Een competitief loon aangevuld met extralegale voordelen zoals onder andere maaltijdcheques, ecocheques, verzekeringen,…
Een job in een bedrijf met de ambitie om te groeien.
Show more

  • Ervaring met Python is een pluspunt.
  • Vaardig met Power BI en BI-rapportering.
  • Begrip van ERP-datamodellen en migratieprocessen (NAV/4PS, Business Central).
  • Ervaring met data quality rules, profiling en cleansing.
  • Inzicht in metadata, governance en datacatalogi.

Analytische vaardigheden

  • Sterk analytisch en probleemoplossend denkvermogen.
  • Kunnen werken met grote en complexe datasets.
  • Systematisch en gestructureerd te werk gaan.
  • End-to-end impactanalyses kunnen uitvoeren.

Soft skills

  • Communicatief sterk en helder in uitleg.
  • Proactief en oplossingsgericht.
  • Ownership nemen, verantwoordelijkheid dragen en zelfstandig vooruitgang boeken.
  • Samenwerken in multidisciplinaire teams.
  • Flexibel omgaan met verandering en onvolledige informatie.

Wat verwachten we qua achtergrond?

  • Bachelor of Master in data-analyse, statistiek, informatica, economie of gelijkwaardig door ervaring.
  • Ervaring in organisaties met veel operationele flows (bouw, logistiek, industrie) is een plus.
  • Relevante ervaring als data-analist of data-kwaliteitsspecialist is een troef.
  • Ervaring in ERP-trajecten of digitale transformaties is een voordeel.

Wat bieden we?

  • Een strategische rol in een cruciaal transformatietraject.
  • Nauwe samenwerking met Business Analysts, Data Stewards en ERP-projectteams.
  • Werken in een omgeving waar pragmatiek, ownership en teamwork centraal staan.
  • De mogelijkheid om datakwaliteit, governance en procesoptimalisaties mee uit te bouwen.
  • Een sterke impact op de toekomst van data binnen BESIX in Schelle.

Aanvullende informatie

Je komt terecht in een groeiend bedrijf waar de grootste succesfactor het enthousiasme en de creativiteit van de eigen medewerkers is. Wij bieden jou:

  • Een voltijdse vaste functie met afwisseling en verantwoordelijkheid.
  • Een competitief loon aangevuld met extralegale voordelen zoals onder andere maaltijdcheques, ecocheques, verzekeringen,…
  • Een job in een bedrijf met de ambitie om te groeien.

Title: Data Analyst/Engineer
Description:
We are wizards who turn data into knowledge. We execute E2E projects in team and work as consultants for various clients (and sectors) – partly on-site/partly from home – to assist them with Microsoft data solutions. Our credo is to empower every professional to make the best data-driven decision. Transforming data into usable knowledge is something you have right at your fingertips.




Your role as a Data Analyt/Engineer

Within this role, you will also contribute to data modelling activities in Power BI environments or data warehouses, translating business requirements into structured data models and validating them with stakeholders.




Managing and customising the ETL or ELT process (Extract, transform, load)

Setting up and customising data integrations and data modelling (SSIS , SSAS, SSRS)

You will be using Microsoft data services on-premise or in Azure, or a combination of both.




Project-based or long-term assignments, all options are on the table. Depending on the assignment, you may be working on your own or in a team, taking care of the project management yourself or not. Participating in pre-sales is also a possibility. The trump cards of this job are variety and continuous learning through experience.




But don’t worry.




The roles within assignments and their complexity will be tailored to you: sufficiently challenging for learning and not over your head. If you demonstrate a keenness to learn, independence and initiative, you will be absolutely fine. Don’t forget that you have a team of helpful Koherians standing behind you who will be happy to help you and facilitate your development.




Experience and Technical skills

3-6y experience in a data analyst or engineer role

Power BI is essential

Azure Datalake Services

Thorough knowledge of T-SQL and of developing ETL flows with Azure components or on-premise tools (ADF / SSIS/…)

Azure data factory (nice to have)

Fabric (nice to have)

Azure Synapse Analytics (nice to have)

Python (nice to have)

Databricks (nice to have)




Languages

Fluency in Dutch and English is a must, and fluency in French would be a bonus.




Are you our next Data Wizard? Don't hesitate and apply!
